evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pass/fail determination per item, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is met. The only related evidence pertains to a specific forklift inspection scenario, which does not comprehensively address the need for pass/fail determinations across all items as required.
gaps: No evidence of pass/fail determination for all required inspection items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
